synonyms: Road to You: Hoshifuruoka no Yakusoku
Road to You: Promise of the Starry Hill
ROAD TO YOU: Kimi e to Tsuzuku Michi
Roads to You: The Road That Goes On to You
Roads to You: Kioku ni Mau Konayuki
Roads to You: The Snow that Dances in Memories
titles.tmdb_title: Road to You: Kimi e to Tsuzuku Michi

description:
Commercials by Dunlop Tyres Japan for their Winter Maxx tire line.

Episode 1 (Kimi e to Tsuzuku Michi) (The Road That Goes On to You): The anime short's story is set in a certain snowy land and centers on the intermingling feelings of three groups of men and women: a couple, a parent and child, and coworkers.

Episode 2 (Hoshifuruoka no Yakusoku) (Promise of the Starry Hill): College student Yui was suddenly invited by her mother to visit an observatory on her 20th birthday. Yui has to travel along snow-covered roads to reach the observatory. The visit makes Yui remember going to the same observatory with her late father on every birthday when she was a small child.

Episode 3 (Kioku ni Mau Konayuki) (The Snow that Dances in Memories)

(Source: Anime News Network)
